title: No IP leak on stream
description: A mod to stop streamers from revealing a server's IP address with a misclick.
body:
While streaming, you may sometimes misclick and reveal your private server's IP address to the audience. With this mod, when streaming software is detected, the "Edit", "Add Server", and "Direct Connection" buttons in the multiplayer menu will be disabled to prevent misclicks.\
反正這是一個可以在實況時可以防止按錯讓觀眾看到私人伺服器IP地址的模組。(ﾉ>ω<)ﾉ

This mod currently have English and 繁體中文

Currently supported streaming software:
- OBS (Tested on Windows 11 & MacOS 15)
- Xsplit
- Streamlabs
- Bandicam
- PRISMLiveStudio

![Showcase when OBS is running, buttons will be disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bff73ad37264caab9d0da8480df8fda69a4fc7_0.webp)
